title: clinopodium intermedium
intro: Clinopodium intermedium, also known as intermediate calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium intermedium include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health. Clinopodium intermedium can be prepared into various herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
